'''darara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okruh|okruh]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okruh|okruh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| darara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || dæræræth || dæræræj || dæræræsh || dæræræ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || darararath || darararaj || darararash || dararara
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || dararath || dararaj || dararash || darara
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || darafrafth || darafrafj || darafrafsh || darafraf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dararatha || dararaja || dararasha || dararaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || dararath || dararaj || dararash || darara
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dararathal || dararajal || dararashal || dararakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dararaathatha || dararaajaja || dararaashasha || dararaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || dararathan || dararajan || dararashan || dararakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dararathaoro || dararajaoro || dararashaoro || dararakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
